{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Anses
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Anses]] is a crippled Heaven’s Glory elder.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
